name: also
description: The action-counterpart to Claude Code's built-in /btw. /btw asks a side question with full conversation context but no tools; /also dispatches a side task to a SEPARATE fork sub-agent that keeps that full context and adds full tools, so a tangential job gets done without derailing the main one. The fork inherits the session's power level — reasoning effort (incl. max/xhigh), ultracode state, and model — with nothing to detect or wire up. User-invoked only (never auto-triggers); slash-available as /also:also.
